assets.qc_summary: Pass: final board reads as a beautiful young adult Frosthoof deer noble shaman rather than a poor shaman, ordinary human, or cute animal figure. It preserves three-state continuity, rare white fur layers, ice-blue and bone-white wardrobe, deer ears and short antlers, bone flute, herb pouch, jade and bead details, and small localized ice-blue shaman fire. The locked Wanshou emblem is not redesigned; northern symbol language remains object/material-based.
